author: lOrm
content: Duplicate of #333 (closed 2026-05-20 in commit 7de5ec96). The deep_merge array-concatenation and recursion-depth concerns raised here are addressed by #333: src/hooks/merge.rs now enforces MAX_MERGE_DEPTH=32, MAX_ARRAY_CONCAT_LEN=8192, and MAX_TOTAL_SIZE=4 MiB, with typed MergeError and rollback-on-error in merge_settings_file. Verified at HEAD f0c5612b. The narrower allowlist-amplification angle (explicit replace/union/disallow per top-level key) is not covered by #333 and may be re-filed as a focused issue if still desired, but the underlying DoS / unbounded-merge defect is fixed.
